items.title: Summarize a customer interview transcript
items.scenario: A PM uploads a 40-minute interview transcript and asks Claude to extract themes, direct quotes, and open questions for the next sprint.
items.explanation: Language + reasoning: Claude compresses unstructured dialogue into actionable product notes.

items.title: Explain a failing unit test
items.scenario: A developer pastes a pytest failure and the relevant function; Claude explains why the assertion failed and suggests a minimal fix.
items.explanation: Coding capability: Claude reads code and error output—human must still run tests and review the patch.

items.title: Review a wireframe screenshot
items.scenario: A designer attaches a mobile mockup and asks Claude to list accessibility concerns and copy inconsistencies.
items.explanation: Vision + language: multimodal input turns screenshots into structured review feedback.

items.title: Lookup live inventory via tool use
items.scenario: A support bot API exposes a `get_order_status` tool; Claude calls it with an order ID from the user's message and summarizes the JSON response.
items.explanation: Tool use: Claude orchestrates language and live data instead of guessing warehouse state.
